data.name: Aurelia
data.detailed_description:
💘CHECK THIS OUT!💘


關於此遊戲

歡迎來到奧雷利亞！

在這款讓人血脈賁張的成人向冒險遊戲中，你將扮演一位年輕的冒險家，回到奧雷利亞繼承小時候的故居。

但命運就在這時顛覆。你一進門就看到了一個神秘的護身符。只是輕輕一碰，一系列奇妙的事件就接踵而來；而你首先面對的，就是某位神秘女子請求寄宿在你的家中。

享受你在奧雷利亞的時光，開闢道路走向新的冒險和奇遇。你將在旅途中邂逅眾多美女。想辦法進入她們的內心——以及裙底下的溫柔鄉！

遊戲特色

  • 復古風格的像素美術，包括動畫在內！ 既要講情懷，又要搞黃色。

  • 探索遍佈奇蹟的世界！奧雷利亞充滿奇異的種族、心動的角色和神秘的遭遇。

  • 無數的故事等你展開！你將邂逅許多獨特的角色。他們各有各的特點、個性和身世。

  • 滿足你的欲望！與各地美女共享豐富的成人場景。

  • 經典的RPG機制！培養角色，升級強化，裝備魔法神器，勇闖地牢殺怪物。

  • 享受趣味盎然的休閒活動和小遊戲！去釣魚、玩二十一點、製作藥水、照料你的魔法花園、管理妓院等等。

  • 為達成偉業者準備了大獎！有超過80項成就可供獲得。它們不僅會讓你倍感自豪和光榮，還會獎勵你額外的內容！

  • 很適合單手遊玩的遊戲機制！……有備無患嘛。

data.short_description: 《奧雷利亞》是一款以魔法橫行的中世紀世界為背景的情色遊戲。你將扮演一位與神秘法師結下不解之緣的年輕人。探索這片土地，一路幹遍所有的異種族美女！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows 7 / 8 / 10 / 11
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Aurelia
data.detailed_description:
💘CHECK THIS OUT!💘


About the Game

Welcome to Aurelia!

In this sensual adult adventure game, you'll take the role of a young adventurer who returns to his newly-inherited childhood cottage in the realm of Aurelia.

By a sudden twist of fate, you come across a mystical amulet right as you walk in the door. A simple touch sets in motion a magical chain of events that begins with a mysterious woman seeking refuge in your home.

Enjoy your time in Aurelia and forge paths that lead to new adventures and new experiences. Along your journey, you'll be able to meet a bounty of beautiful women. Find your way into their hearts—and beneath their skirts!

Features

  • Retro-inspired pixel art, including animations! Brimming with nostalgia & erotic style.

  • Explore a world full of wonder! Aurelia has plenty of exotic races, exciting characters, and mystical encounters.

  • Myriad tales to unfold! You'll meet many unique characters, each with their own traits, personalities, and backstories.

  • Satisfy your lust! Enjoy plentiful adult scenes with beauties across the land.

  • Good ol' RPG mechanics! Build your stats, equip magical artifacts, brave the dungeon, and slay monsters.

  • Kick back with leisure activities and minigames! Go fishing, play blackjack, craft potions, tend your magical garden, manage a brothel, and more.

  • Prizes for the completionists! There are over 80 achievements to obtain. They will not only give you a sense of pride and accomplishment but also reward you with extra content!

  • Game mechanics that are perfect for playing one-handed! ...Just in case.

data.short_description: Aurelia is an erotic game set in a magic-filled medieval world. Play as a young man that becomes fatefully entangled with a mysterious magician. Explore the land, bedding exotic beauties along the way!
data.supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Russian

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Microsoft Windows 7 / 8 / 10 / 11
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 350 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
